description: On Friday, April 27th, 2018, KEXP's long-running rockabilly show Shake the Shack ceased shaking as host Mike Fuller retires and the show ended its 30+ year run. Doctor Leon Berman, "The Proctologist of Rock 'n' Roll" was the original host. Here you will find the true roots of Rock 'n Roll.
name: 🎸 Shake the Shack on KEXP - the best of Rockabilly, Boogie Rhythm & Blues, Old Style Country, Surf
